title: ceratozamia zaragozae
intro: Ceratozamia zaragozae, also known as the Zacualpan cycad, is a species of cycad that belongs to the family Zamiaceae, native to Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ceratozamia zaragozae include the potential treatment of various ailments, such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, due to its antimicrobial and antiseptic properties. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made from the seeds, leaves, or roots, which can be used to create teas, infusions, or topical creams.
